analysis: The project appears to be a website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs) and contains files related to black holes theme. The event.json specifies the topic as black holes with a theme of 'no bulk animated objects slide animated page'. The existing to-dos indicate that the CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files need to be completed with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The project also requires mobile-friendly navigation and interactive elements related to black holes.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and styling.

Fix the SVG data URL in --black-hole-pattern-5 to include proper SVG content and ensure it is correctly formatted. Complete the CSS file to include all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Fix the syntax error by adding the missing closing brace for the 'beforeunload' event listener function. Implement the mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions.
